events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The user wants a JSON response only, matching the specified schema, for a production welding inspection scenario. The field condition is: parameters outside WPS window. Work is through testing/inspection step. References: AWS D1.1/D1.3, shop WPS.

Decision must be fail if non-compliant - welding parameters outside WPS window is non-compliant. Risk is high or critical? Parameters outside WPS window affects weld quality, structural integrity, could lead to failures. I'd say high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 90 or 100 since inspected. Value 0. Confidence 0.95. Event time etc 0. Order empty. Workable empty. Findings: welding parameters outside WPS window; weld produced does not conform to qualified WPS; potential lack of fusion, inadequate penetration, excessive heat input. Actions: reject weld; rework per WPS; requalify if needed; verify machine calibration; retrain operator; reinspect. Rationale: per AWS D1.1, welding must be performed within parameters of qualified WPS; deviations mean the weld does not meet acceptance criteria. References: AWS D1.1/D1.3, shop WPS.

Need ensure no markdown.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 90,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Welding machine settings/parameters outside the qualified WPS window",
    "Weld deposited under non-conforming parameters",
    "Risk of inadequate fusion, penetration, or excessive heat input",
    "Non-compliance with AWS D1.1/D1.3 and shop WPS requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the non-conforming weld(s)",
    "Rework or remove and replace weld per qualified WPS",
    "Verify and calibrate welding equipment",
    "Review operator setup procedure and retrain if necessary",
    "Reinspect after rework"
  ],
  "rationale": "AWS D1.1/D1.3 requires production welding to be performed within the parameters of the qualified WPS. Machine settings outside the WPS window produce welds that cannot be assumed to meet the mechanical and quality requirements of the procedure, so the work fails inspection.",
  "references": ["AWS D1.1", "AWS D1.3", "shop WPS"]
}
